modern_oled_phone_indoor.name: Modern OLED smartphone, indoor SDR viewing with auto-brightness. y_peak is the SDR auto-brightness setpoint (~400 cd/m^2 indoors), NOT the panel's HDR/sunlight peak (1000-2000 cd/m^2). The OLED's near-zero native black (0.0005 cd/m^2) is washed out by 250 lux ambient reflection, so effective contrast is ~1000:1. Imazen reference condition for phone-targeted web image scoring; not from upstream ColorVideoVDP.
